creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Even my EP-803AW seems to be able to print successfully by following the steps below :)

Install print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2
Extract Epson-EP-803A-epson-escpr-en.ppd from package epson-inkjet-printer-escpr-1.7.9.txz
sed -i '' -e '/^\*cupsFilter:/{s,/usr/local/libexec/cups/filter/epson-escpr-wrapper,/compat/linux/opt/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2/cups/lib/filter/epson-escpr-wrapper2,;}' Epson-EP-803A-epson-escpr-en.ppd
Modify cupsd printer. Upload Epson-EP-803A-epson-escpr-en.ppd that has been rewritten by sed.
